goalText:
GOAL: Verify the pi-curator plugin's current functionalities are COMPLETE and CORRECT against its openspec specs.

Success criteria (verifiers MUST independently run commands + read code, zero trust):
1. `npm run typecheck` (tsc --noEmit) exits 0.
2. `npx vitest run` reports 0 failures (baseline 447 tests across 21 files).
3. curator-config spec (openspec/specs/curator-config/spec.md): layered merge defaults<-global<-project (src/util/config.ts), persona schema validation, alias rules — covered by src/util/config.test.ts.
4. curator-lifecycle spec: spawn trigger + spawn gate (src/main/spawn-gate.ts, src/main/index.ts), non-bias context filter (src/util/filter-session.ts), context trim (src/util/trim-session.ts), PID file + staleness (src/util/staleness.ts, src/util/heartbeat-lease.ts), exclusivity.
5. curator-runtime spec: heartbeat loop + phase transitions (src/runtime/heartbeat.ts, src/runtime/index.ts), beforeExit non-throwing, graceful degradation when signal_main absent.
6. curator-signal spec: signal_main tool + transport via pi-intercom broker + main-side receiver (src/crosscheck/*, src/curator-receiver/*), steer/append/severity routing.
7. Janitor (src/janitor/*): sweeps dead curators, GCs old fork files AND old stderr logs (D11), stateless per tick.
8. No dead code: D11 log GC wired into production entry (pi-curator-janitor.ts tickOnce logsDir), heartbeat wired into runtime/index.ts entry with curatorSessionId pointer (LD1).

APPROVE only if every spec requirement maps to implemented, tested code with zero defects. REJECT with concrete file:line evidence otherwise.
context: pi-curator repo at /home/bhd/Documents/Projects/bhd/pi-curator, main branch, clean tree. Run npm test + tsc, read openspec/specs/* and src/.
